jobs.rawText:
Job Title: Senior Software Engineer
Company: Acme Tech Corporation
Location: San Francisco, CA
Work Mode: Remote
Salary: $120,000 - $140,000 per year

Required Skills: Node.js, TypeScript, MongoDB, REST APIs, Docker, AWS, Kubernetes
Experience Required: 5+ years
Application Deadline: July 31, 2026

We are looking for an experienced Senior Software Engineer to join our team.

jobs.rawText:
Job Title: Senior Software Engineer
Company: Acme Tech
Location: Remote / US
Employment Type: Full-time
Salary: $120,000 - $145,000 per year

About the role:
Acme Tech is seeking a Senior Software Engineer to build scalable backend services for our SaaS platform. You will collaborate with product, design, and QA to deliver high-performance APIs and reliable systems.

Responsibilities:
- Design, develop, and maintain RESTful APIs using Node.js and TypeScript
- Build scalable microservices and integrate with MongoDB
- Write clean, testable code and participate in code reviews
- Optimize performance and reliability of backend systems
- Mentor junior engineers and contribute to architecture decisions

Required skills:
- 5+ years of software engineering experience
- Strong JavaScript/TypeScript and Node.js expertise
- Experience with MongoDB or other NoSQL databases
- Familiarity with REST APIs, microservices, and cloud deployment
- Excellent communication and collaboration skills

Preferred qualifications:
- Experience with Next.js or React
- Knowledge of containers and Docker
- Prior work in AI-powered or SaaS products
- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or related field
